seoTitle: Dudley West vs Dulwich — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dudley West and Dulwich. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dudley West vs Dulwich: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dudley West and Dulwich.
heading: Dudley West vs Dulwich — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dudley West, South Australia and Dulwich, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dulwich has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Dudley West (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dudley West or Dulwich safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dudley West has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Dulwich scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dudley West scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Dulwich scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dudley West or Dulwich?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dulwich has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
